name: platform boundary: normalizes an injected native API response into recommendations and a review reference
command:
cat > opts.json <<'JEOF'
{"option_count":2,"options":[{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced hybrid","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az","monitoring"]},{"option_id":"opt-cost","summary":"Cost-optimized","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","backup"]}]}
JEOF
cat > native.json <<'JEOF'
{"review_ref":"native-review/workload/abc123","recommendations":[{"id":"REL-1","title":"Add multi-AZ","pillar":"reliability"},{"id":"SEC-3","title":"Enable encryption","pillar":"security"}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/platform-boundary.sh" --options opts.json --select opt-balanced --platform aws --native-response native.json --out h.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("h.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.recommendations.length===2 && j.recommendations[0].source==="native-aws" && j.native_review_ref==="native-review/workload/abc123"?0:1)' && echo native-normalized 1>&2
